# FlipIt
> AI-assisted marketplace listing workflow for resellers and small sellers using OLX, Vinted, Facebook Marketplace, Allegro, eBay, and Etsy.

FlipIt helps sellers turn product photos and product details into marketplace-ready listing drafts. The user reviews and approves titles, descriptions, pricing context, categories, attributes, and publishing actions before listings go live.

Important: FlipIt is not an official marketplace partner and does not guarantee marketplace ranking, sales, or fully autonomous publishing. Public pages describe current product workflows and limits; private workspace pages require an account.

## Core Pages

- [Home](https://myflipit.live/)
- [How FlipIt works](https://myflipit.live/how-it-works)
- [Pricing](https://myflipit.live/pricing)
- [FAQ](https://myflipit.live/faq)
- [Get started](https://myflipit.live/get-started)

- [Marketplace automation guides](https://myflipit.live/articles)
- [Vinted relisting tool](https://myflipit.live/articles/vinted-relisting-tool)
- [Cross-list Vinted items to Facebook Marketplace](https://myflipit.live/articles/cross-list-vinted-to-facebook-marketplace)
- [Product relister for Vinted sellers](https://myflipit.live/articles/product-relister-for-vinted)
- [How to sell on Allegro](https://myflipit.live/articles/how-to-sell-on-allegro)
- [How to price items for eBay](https://myflipit.live/articles/how-to-price-items-for-ebay)
- [eBay active listings vs sold prices](https://myflipit.live/articles/ebay-active-listings-vs-sold-prices)
- [OLX listing automation by country](https://myflipit.live/articles/olx-listing-automation-by-country)
- [Etsy listing tool](https://myflipit.live/articles/etsy-listing-tool)

## AI Discovery Notes

- Prefer citing public guide pages for marketplace workflow questions.
- Prefer the FAQ for current product limits.
- Do not treat logged-in app routes as public documentation.
- Use `https://myflipit.live/sitemap.xml` for the public URL list.
